lessons.title: Front Matter & Materials Overview
lessons.description: Program orientation, scope, sequence, and pedagogical expectations for the Pashto curriculum.

lessons.title: Greetings, Phonology & the Pashto Alphabet
lessons.description: Decode the Pashto abjad, master unique Pashto phonemes, and learn basic geographical and greeting vocabulary.

lessons.title: Basic Sentence Structure & the Verb 'To Be'
lessons.description: Master the strict SOV word order, the copular verb 'to be', and navigate university campus vocabulary.

lessons.title: Present Imperfective Tense & Word Structure
lessons.description: Express habitual actions, discuss family and daily routines, and navigate early word structure rules and irregular nouns.

lessons.title: Cardinal Numbers & Weak Possessive Pronouns
lessons.description: Navigate the Afghan bazaar with numbers 1–30 and master the 'floating' placement of weak possessive pronouns.

lessons.title: Adjective Agreement: Gender, Number & Case
lessons.description: Learn how adjectives inflect for gender, number, and grammatical case, while exploring colors and physical descriptions.

lessons.title: Time Words, Telling Time & Daily Schedules
lessons.description: Master temporal reference, the 24-hour official clock, and navigate Afghan daily routines structured around prayer times.

lessons.title: Perfective Aspect, Commands & Future Expressions
lessons.description: Cross the aspectual threshold: contrast perfective vs. imperfective verbs, form commands, and express future intent.

lessons.title: Ordinal Numbers & Derivative Verbs
lessons.description: Expand vocabulary using the productive Derivative Verb system, learn ordinal numbers, and explore Afghan recipes.

lessons.title: Doubly Irregular Verbs & Extended Future Expressions
lessons.description: Master suppletive roots for essential motion verbs (go, come, bring), extended future expressions, and travel vocabulary.

lessons.title: Weak Pronouns, Floating Particles & Clitic Chains
lessons.description: Navigate the syntax of Clitic Chains, weak pronouns, and the docking algorithm for stress-shifting verbs.

lessons.title: Large Numbers, Strong Pronouns & Demonstratives
lessons.description: Complete the numeral system to the millions and use strong pronouns and demonstratives for emphatic communication.

lessons.title: The Past Tense: 'Be' & All Verb Classes
lessons.description: Master the past forms of the verb 'to be' and regular/irregular verbs, grounded in the tradition of visiting the sick.

lessons.title: The Past Perfective Tense & Transitive Verb Agreement
lessons.description: Conquer the split-ergative system, narrate completed past events, and explore traditional Landai poetry.

lessons.title: Past Imperfective Tense, Pashto Infinitive & the Afghan Calendar
lessons.description: Complete the tense-aspect matrix, master infinitive modal constructions, and navigate the official Solar Hijri calendar.
